perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a woman in a pinkish-beige dress and a brown bucket hat standing in a Costco warehouse aisle, holding a carton of green milk tea; she gestures excitedly toward the camera. (2) Close-up shots show a nearly empty shelf where the milk tea is located compared to other stocked shelves. (3) The scene shifts to an indoor living room setting where the same woman and another woman in a blue top are seated at a table, pouring the green milk tea into glasses with straws. (4) Close-up shots of the product label highlight specific ingredient lists, with fingers pointing at the text to emphasize the milk content. (5) A comparison graphic appears showing another brand's milk tea label. (6) Both women taste the drink and react with neutral expressions, followed by a summary gesture.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy female vocals begin with ambient Costco background noise; upbeat, rhythmic BGM plays throughout. (2) Sound effects like a 'pop' or 'ding' occur when text overlays appear. (3) A male voice is heard off-screen contributing to the discussion about the ingredients and price during the indoor scene. (4) The audio transitions to a more focused dialogue between the two women and the off-screen male voice, with the BGM remaining steady in the background. (5) Clinking of glasses and liquid pouring sounds are audible during the tasting phase.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '你知道現在最紅的是什麼嗎?' (Do you know what's most popular right now?) - Curious tone. (2) Decorative Text: 'Threads 現在每個人都在喝這個' (Everyone on Threads is drinking this now) - Informative hook. (3) Functional Text: '茉莉綠奶茶' (Jasmine Green Milk Tea) - Identifying the product. (4) Decorative Text: '超級普通' (Super average) - Honest/Disappointed tone appearing in large white font. (5) Decorative Text: '一瓶只要50元 / 一組三罐149' (50 dollars a bottle / 149 for a pack of three) - Pricing info. (6) Functional Text: '生乳量比奶粉多喔~' (More fresh milk than milk powder) - Comparison highlight.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro/Hook at Costco -> Buying product -> Home tasting/Review -> Ingredient comparison -> Final verdict.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators onscreen, 0 males visible (though 1 is heard), some distant blurred shoppers in background at Costco.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with short dark hair, wearing a brown bucket hat and a pinkish-beige dress with puff sleeves.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: First half is in a Costco warehouse with orange shelving, bulk products, and white/blue labels. Second half is in a domestic living room/studio with a white table, a beige sofa in the back, and household items.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Mixed: Bright overhead warehouse lighting and warm indoor home lighting.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide an honest review of a viral milk tea product found at Costco. The video uses the 'hype vs. reality' hook, starting with the influencer discovering the popular item in-store and concluding with a home taste-test and ingredient analysis that labels the product as average despite its social media popularity.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video provides a critical/neutral review ('super average') which typically contradicts a paid endorsement.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-density variety-show style text overlays and a mix of shopping-vlog and sit-down review formats.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video leverages the popularity of the 'Threads' social media platform to drive interest in the product review.
